request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support civil defense programs, but let's be real - most of these initiatives just create unnecessary panic. We already have strong national security measures in place. Adding more 'preparedness' programs just wastes taxpayer money and makes people anxious about threats that aren't actually likely. We should focus on proven security measures instead of scare tactics. #NationalSecurity #SmartSpending
